text.title: Regulatory Compliance 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from product surface + jurisdiction to required WCAG conformance level and applicable regulation. Every leaf references a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the product surface public-facing (consumer or public-sector users)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — track internal a11y as risk, not regulated compliance
Apply Section-508 (WCAG 2.0 AA minimum); design to 2.2 AA per wcag-baseline rule.
Apply ADA Title II (WCAG 2.1 AA, deadline 2026-04-24).
Add UK-EQA / AU-DDA / JP-JIS-X-8341 rows; do not silently omit.

branch.question: Manual + AT-user testing evidence available this release?

conclusion.verdict: Downgrade claim to 'partial conformance with named gaps' until evidence exists.
Draft + legal-review + publish dated statement with methodology checkboxes.

text.example: public_facing=true → jurisdictions=[US,EU] → ADA Title II + EAA both apply → at_user_session=true → publish statement (WCAG 2.2 AA design baseline; 2.1 AA legal minimum).
